channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Roman Space Telescope to transform astronomy
item.description: NASA's Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is now targeting an earlier launch in September 2026.

item.title: Scientists revise understanding of muon particle
item.description: Decades of searching for a new force inside the muon have led to revised conclusions.

item.title: Rare graves reveal a lost world of Bronze Age Europe hidden for 3,000 years
item.description: Scientists have uncovered remarkable new details about Bronze Age life in Central Europe by studying rare burials untouched by cremation. The research...

item.title: A strange ripple in spacetime could be the first fingerprint of dark matter
item.description: Black holes crashing together may be revealing clues about dark matter hidden across the universe. Physicists created a new model predicting how dark ...
